issues.detail: Missing realistic demonstrations of the skill in action.

scenarios.name: auth-test-regression-investigation
scenarios.rationale: Response A includes a bug packet, investigation brief, and swarm launch with agents, whereas Response B lacks these core components; thus A is more complete but still missing sub‑agent outputs and diagnosis synthesis.

scenarios.name: api-500-deployment-diagnosis
scenarios.rationale: Response A provides a bug packet and investigation brief, whereas Response B only gives a generic workflow without the required packet, sub-agent hypotheses, or diagnosis path.
